behavior.name: camera_calibration
behavior.author: Gabriel
behavior.description:
Behavior for camera calibration using a Charuco board.
Flow: 1. Manual capture of Charuco board photos in different positions 2. Automatic camera calibration using charuco_calibrator 3. Saving results in ~/calibrations/camera_intrinsics.yaml
Controls during capture: - SPACE or ENTER: Take photo - ESC: Cancel

param.name: save_file_name
param.label: File name
param.hint: Calibration file name (will be saved in ~/calibrations/)

param.name: output_folder
param.label: Custom folder
param.hint: Folder to save images (leave empty to use ~/calibrations/camera_calib_pictures/)
